C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\1.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\1.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\1.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--stack,104857600 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\1.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o C:\c\1.exe -Wl,--out-implib,C:\c\lib1.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\1.dir\linkLibs.rsp
